title: hieracium wiesbaurianum subsp. subcanens
intro: Hieracium wiesbaurianum subsp. subcanens, also known as hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which may help to soothe and heal wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Hieracium wiesbaurianum subsp. subcanens is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
